name: flux-pulid
description: ⚡️FLUX PuLID: FLUX-dev based Pure and Lightning ID Customization via Contrastive Alignment🎭

guidance_scale.description: Set the guidance scale for text prompt influence (1.0-10.0)
guidance_scale.title: Guidance Scale

height.description: Set the height of the generated image (256-1536 pixels)
height.title: Height

id_weight.description: Set the weight of the ID image influence (0.0-3.0)
id_weight.title: Id Weight

main_face_image.description: Upload an ID image for face generation
main_face_image.title: Main Face Image

max_sequence_length.description: Set the max sequence length for prompt (T5), smaller is faster (128-512)
max_sequence_length.title: Max Sequence Length

negative_prompt.default: bad quality, worst quality, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, low resolution, partially rendered objects, deformed or partially rendered eyes, deformed, deformed eyeballs, cross-eyed, blurry
negative_prompt.description: Enter a negative prompt to specify what to avoid in the image
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

num_outputs.description: Set the number of images to generate (1-4)
num_outputs.title: Num Outputs

num_steps.description: Set the number of denoising steps (1-20)
num_steps.title: Num Steps

output_format.description: Choose the format of the output image
output_format.title: output_format

output_quality.description: Set the quality of the output image for jpg and webp (1-100)
output_quality.title: Output Quality

prompt.description: Enter a text prompt to guide image generation
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Set a random seed for generation (leave blank or -1 for random)
seed.title: Seed

start_step.description: Set the timestep to start inserting ID (0-4 recommended, 0 for highest fidelity, 4 for more editability)
start_step.title: Start Step

true_cfg.description: Set the Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scale. 1.0 uses standard CFG, while values >1.0 enable True CFG for more precise control over generation. Higher values increase adherence to the prompt at the cost of image quality.
true_cfg.title: True Cfg

width.description: Set the width of the generated image (256-1536 pixels)
width.title: Width
